note: Exp required to complete a given battlepass level. Formula from HHLGFMHFAEO(level) in DDACKPKBCIF.cs line 4561. Each scaling threshold is applied cumulatively using OFFHLNIICAN (round-half-up).
formula: base = 50 * level * level; if level > 35: base = round_half_up(base * (1 + (level - 35) * 0.05)); if level > 50: base = round_half_up(base * (1 + (level - 50) * 0.05)); if level > 75: base = round_half_up(base * (1 + (level - 75) * 0.05)); if level > 100: base = round_half_up(base * (1 + (level - 100) * 0.05))
